name: Quaal's Feather Token (Fan)
description: If you are on a boat or ship, you can take a Magic action to toss the token up to 10 feet in the air. The token disappears, and a giant flapping fan takes its place. The fan floats and creates a strong wind. This wind can fill the sails of one ship, increasing its speed by 5 miles per hour for 8 hours. You can dismiss the fan as a Magic action.

properties.requirement: Must be on a boat or ship

wind_generation.activation: Toss token up to 10 feet in air
wind_generation.effect: Giant flapping fan that creates strong wind
